_comment: Riḥlat al-Kalimāt site config — dilim 7/19.ι.A. Source-of-truth for production origin used by both Vite (vite.config.ts → rihlaOriginInject) and the sitemap generator (scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs). When the real domain is registered, update `origin` here; SITE_ORIGIN env still overrides this file.
_originStatusOptions: placeholder — gerçek domain henüz tescil edilmedi
staging — preview deploy URL (örn. rihla.pages.dev veya https://rihla-staging.netlify.app)
